mapper.select:
SELECT s.stock_code, s.stock_name, NVL(t.current_price, 0) AS price, NVL(t.change_rate, 0) AS changeRate, NVL(t.volume, 0) AS volume FROM stocks s
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT stock_code, current_price, change_rate, volume, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY stock_code ORDER BY trade_time DESC ) rn FROM stock_realtime_tick ) t ON s.stock_code = t.stock_code AND t.rn = 1
WHERE s.status = 'ACTIVE'
ORDER BY volume DESC NULLS LAST
SELECT stock_code FROM ( SELECT stock_code, volume, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY volume DESC ) rn FROM stock_realtime_tick ) WHERE rn = 1

SELECT s.stock_code, s.stock_name, NVL(t.current_price, 0) AS price, NVL(t.change_rate, 0) AS changeRate FROM stocks s
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT stock_code, current_price, change_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY stock_code ORDER BY trade_time DESC ) rn FROM stock_realtime_tick ) t ON s.stock_code = t.stock_code AND t.rn = 1 WHERE s.stock_code = #{stockCode}
SELECT current_price FROM ( SELECT current_price FROM stock_realtime_tick WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode} ORDER BY trade_time DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20
SELECT stock_code FROM stocks WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND market_type IN ('KOSPI', 'KOSDAQ') AND ROWNUM <= 25 ORDER BY stock_code
